description: Learn the fundamentals of JavaScript including variables, data types, operators, and control flow. This foundational course covers everything you need to know to start programming in JavaScript.
Master React components, props, state management, and the component lifecycle. Build reusable UI components that power modern web applications.
Explore advanced CSS techniques including flexbox, grid, animations, and responsive design. Create beautiful and responsive user interfaces.
Understand RESTful API design principles, HTTP methods, status codes, and best practices. Build robust APIs that integrate seamlessly with your applications.
Learn relational and non-relational database concepts, normalization, indexing, and query optimization for efficient data management.
Master Git workflow, branching strategies, merging, and collaboration techniques for effective version control in team environments.
Understand common web vulnerabilities like XSS, CSRF, SQL injection, and learn how to implement security best practices in your applications.
Learn unit testing, integration testing, and end-to-end testing approaches using popular frameworks like Jest and React Testing Library.
Advanced TypeScript concepts including generics, decorators, modules, and type inference. Build type-safe applications at scale.
Build full-stack applications with Next.js. Learn about server-side rendering, static generation, API routes, and deployment strategies.
Techniques for optimizing web application performance including code splitting, lazy loading, caching, and monitoring tools.
Introduction to DevOps practices, CI/CD pipelines, containerization with Docker, and orchestration with Kubernetes.
